headline: Why Applied Materials (AMAT) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of semiconductor machinery manufacturer Applied Materials (NASDAQ:AMAT) jumped 7.7% in the morning session after peer Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (TSM) announced plans to raise chipmaking prices by up to 10% starting in 2027, while wafer supplier IQE plc raised its guidance. These developments reaffirmed robust demand for AI and data-center chips alongside the ongoing need for incremental chip capacity.
